scripts.build: VER=$(git describe --tags --exact-match 2>/dev/null || echo dev) && bun build --compile --define "BUILD_VERSION=\"$VER\"" index.ts --outfile cael
scripts.build:all: VER=$(git describe --tags --exact-match 2>/dev/null || echo dev) && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --define "BUILD_VERSION=\"$VER\"" index.ts --outfile cael-darwin-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --define "BUILD_VERSION=\"$VER\"" index.ts --outfile cael-darwin-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --define "BUILD_VERSION=\"$VER\"" index.ts --outfile cael-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --define "BUILD_VERSION=\"$VER\"" index.ts --outfile cael-linux-arm64
